name: [TC-501] Create Purchase Draft (TX-P1)
steps:
1. Go to /transactions/new → select 'Purchase'
2. Fill:
   - Supplier: Karachi Fabrics Ltd (S1)
   - Date: 2026-03-01
   - Delivery Fee: 500
   - Notes: First purchase test
3. Add line 1: P1-V1 (Small S), Qty 10, Unit Cost 1500, Discount 0
4. Add line 2: P1-V2 (Medium), Qty 5, Unit Cost 1100, Discount 0
5. Verify totals in form: Line1=15000, Line2=5500, Subtotal=20500, Delivery=500, Total=21000
6. Click 'Save as Draft' (do NOT post yet)
expected_result:
- Status: DRAFT
- Type: PURCHASE, Supplier: Karachi Fabrics Ltd, Total: PKR 21,000.00
- S1 balance still PKR 0.00
- P1-V1 stock still 0
- Dashboard payables unchanged
notes: RECORD TX-P1 ID. Draft must NOT affect any balances or stock.

name: [TC-502] View Draft in Transaction List & Edit
steps:
1. Go to /transactions → verify TX-P1 shows DRAFT, type PURCHASE, PKR 21,000
2. Filter type=PURCHASE → TX-P1 visible
3. Filter status=POSTED → TX-P1 NOT visible
4. Open TX-P1 → Edit
5. Change Line 1 unit cost from 1500 to 1500 (no change needed, already 1500)
   Note: in TC-501 we set cost to 1500, total is already 21000. Skip edit or verify edit works by changing delivery fee to 0 and back.
6. Verify total recalculates correctly on edit
expected_result:
- TX-P1 visible in list with DRAFT status
- Type/status filters work correctly
- Edit saves correctly, total recalculates

name: [TC-503] Post Purchase TX-P1 and Verify All Side Effects
steps:
1. Open TX-P1 → click 'Post' → confirm
2. Verify status = POSTED, document number assigned (e.g. PUR-001)
3. Check /supplier/detail/[S1_ID]:
   - Balance card = PKR 21,000.00
   - Ledger tab: 1 entry dated 2026-03-01, amount 21,000, running balance 21,000
   - Open Documents tab: TX-P1 listed, remaining PKR 21,000
4. Check /products/detail/[P1_ID]:
   - P1-V1 stock = 10, P1-V2 stock = 5, Total = 15 Meters
   - P1-V1 Avg Cost = PKR 1,500, P1-V2 Avg Cost = PKR 1,100
   - Movements tab: PURCHASE_IN entries for both variants, date 2026-03-01
5. Check /transactions: TX-P1 status = POSTED
6. Check / Dashboard:
   - Total Payables = PKR 21,000.00
   - Cash & Bank = PKR 170,000.00 (unchanged)
7. Check /reports/aged-payables (date 2026-03-05): S1 = PKR 21,000
8. Check /reports/inventory-valuation (date 2026-03-05): P1-V1 qty 10 val 15000, P1-V2 qty 5 val 5500
expected_result:
- All 8 verification points pass
- Supplier balance: PKR 21,000
- P1-V1 stock: 10, P1-V2 stock: 5
- Dashboard payables: PKR 21,000
- Cash & Bank unchanged: PKR 170,000
notes: This is the most critical test in Phase 2. Each sub-check is a separate potential bug.

name: [TC-504] Post Second Purchase TX-P2 and Verify Accumulation
steps:
1. Create purchase: S1, Date 2026-03-05, No delivery fee
   Line: P1-V1, Qty 20, Cost 1500. Total = PKR 30,000
2. Save as Draft → Post
3. Check /supplier/detail/[S1_ID]:
   - Balance = PKR 51,000 (21,000 + 30,000)
   - Ledger: 2 entries, running balance 51,000
   - Open Documents: 2 invoices, total PKR 51,000
4. Check /products/detail/[P1_ID]:
   - P1-V1 stock = 30 (10 + 20)
   - P1-V2 stock = 5 (unchanged)
5. Check Dashboard: Payables = PKR 51,000
expected_result:
- S1 balance: PKR 51,000
- P1-V1 stock: 30
- 2 ledger entries, 2 open invoices

name: [TC-505] Post Purchase TX-P3 from S2 and Verify Isolation
steps:
1. Create purchase: S2, Date 2026-03-07, Delivery Fee 1000
   Line 1: P2-V1 (6mm), Qty 100, Cost 50
   Line 2: P2-V2 (12mm), Qty 50, Cost 80
   Total = (100×50) + (50×80) + 1000 = 5000+4000+1000 = PKR 10,000
2. Save Draft → Post
3. Check /supplier/detail/[S2_ID]: Balance = PKR 10,000
4. Verify S1 balance still PKR 51,000 (not affected)
5. Check /products/detail/[P2_ID]: P2-V1 = 100 Kg, P2-V2 = 50 Kg
6. Dashboard: Total Payables = PKR 61,000 (S1+S2), Supplier count = 2
expected_result:
- S2 balance: PKR 10,000
- S1 balance: PKR 51,000 (isolated)
- P2-V1: 100, P2-V2: 50
- Dashboard payables: PKR 61,000

name: [TC-506] Create and Delete a Draft Purchase
steps:
1. Create a purchase draft: any supplier, any 1 line item
2. Save as Draft (do NOT post)
3. Verify draft appears in /transactions list
4. Open draft → delete it
5. Verify draft disappears from list
6. Verify no balance or stock changes occurred
expected_result:
- Draft deleted successfully
- No supplier/stock/dashboard changes
- Posted transactions cannot be deleted (verify delete button absent/disabled on TX-P1)

name: [TC-507] Reports Spot-Check After Purchases
steps:
1. Go to /reports/aged-payables, set date 2026-03-10
   Expected: S1 = PKR 51,000, S2 = PKR 10,000, Total = PKR 61,000
2. Go to /reports/inventory-valuation, set date 2026-03-10
   Expected: P1-V1 qty30 val45000, P1-V2 qty5 val5500, P2-V1 qty100 val5000, P2-V2 qty50 val4000, Total = PKR 59,500
3. Go to /reports/trial-balance, set date 2026-03-10
   Expected: Debits = Credits (balanced), Inventory ~59,500 Dr, Payables ~61,000 Cr
expected_result:
- Aged Payables total: PKR 61,000
- Inventory Valuation total: PKR 59,500
- Trial Balance: balanced (debits = credits)
notes: Delivery fees on purchases may affect exact inventory valuation — note actual vs expected
